zh.title: 砖头用途
zh.description: 发散思维经典任务：尽可能多地想出一个普通物体的不寻常用途。
zh.question:
在下面空白处，尽可能多地写下你能想到的砖头的所有不寻常用途。越有创意越好！

例如：不是简单地说"建房子"，而是"用作门挡"、"用作镇纸"等。
zh.hint: 尝试打破功能固着！想想砖头的属性：重量、硬度、形状、材质、颜色...

en.title: Brick Uses
en.description: Classic divergent thinking task: Generate as many unusual uses for an ordinary object as possible.
en.question:
In the space below, write down as many unusual uses for a brick as you can think of. The more creative the better!

Example: Instead of "build houses", think "doorstop", "paperweight", etc.
en.hint: Try to break functional fixedness! Think about brick's properties: weight, hardness, shape, material, color...

reference: Guilford, J. P. (1967). The Nature of Human Intelligence
